form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 5th (Fr1) over 1760m at this track, beaten 13 m by Gotonebettor (2:09.40) in NR 41 to 45 on April 5 at $26. At the previous start was well back in the run when 5th (Fr5) over 1609m at Tamworth, at the bell was 7th-13.69 beaten 17 m by Whiskey Royale (1:57.50) in NR 39 to 44 on March 26 at $26. Draws the pegs and can bounce back.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run when 2nd (Fr2) over 1760m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 1.5 m by Seven Rippin Aces (2:10.70) in NR 36 to 40 on April 5 at $9.50. Leading player.

formComments.comment: Improved last start with a good run when 2nd (Fr2) over 1760m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 1.5 m by Seven Rippin Aces (2:10.70) in NR 36 to 40 on April 5 at $9.50. Leading player.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into fifth after being driven well back, behind Bellrivergirl at this track over 1760m in a NR up to 35 on April 5 at $2.10. Raced better the start before that with a solid effort despite getting well back, when 2nd (Fr6) over 1609m at Tamworth, beaten 22 m by Jeremy Lou (1:58.30) in NR up to 34 on March 26 at $11. Bold showing expected this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in rounding the home turn and contacted marker pegs.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; was well back in the run when 6th (Fr5) over 1760m at this track beaten 10 m by Seven Rippin Aces (2:10.70) in NR 36 to 40 on April 5 at $11. Showed ability the run before when he posted a big 22 m win (Sr2) at Tamworth (1:58.30) beating Sparkling Sue in NR up to 34 on March 26 at $4.20 at the bell was leading 2.86. Winning chance on his best form.
